extract: Sobble (Japanese: メッソン Messon) is a Water-type Pokémon introduced in Generation VIII. It evolves into Drizzile starting at level 16, which evolves into Inteleon starting at level 35. Along with Grookey and Scorbunny, Sobble is one of the three first partner Pokémon of Galar available at the beginning of Pokémon Sword and Shield. Along with Grookey and Scorbunny, it was the first Generation VIII Pokémon to be revealed to the public on February 27, 2019.
